case_title: QUAN HON LAM VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED APR-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. 506 PLAINTIFF QUAN HON LAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. CERTIFIED COURT VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT #300210 IS PRESENT TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF, BUT AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF WANTED TO PROCEED IN ENGLISH AND ONLY IF NECESSARY WOULD UTILIZE INTERPRETER'S ASSISTANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,389.70 FILED BY LAM, QUAN HON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, QUAN HON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,989.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,064.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
